_doc: Strongholds table per Nevsky 2nd Edition. Sources: Nevsky_Strongholds.txt, Rules of Play 1.3.1 / 4.5.1 / 4.5.2, Second Edition Changes (Bishopric and Castle garrisons each reduced by 1 Men-at-Arms). Capacity is the maximum number of Lords that may Withdraw inside (1.3.1, 4.3.4). Walls are rolled only in Storm/Sally/by-Event (4.4.2, 4.5.2). Garrison units (counts/types) are deployed at start of Storm; Garrison Men-at-Arms have Archery with target Armor -2; Garrison Knights have Melee only (no Archery). Trade Routes are boxed Locales with no Walls/Capacity/Garrison; they Conquer simply by enemy Lord presence and cannot be Sacked. Commanderies are not in this table; Phase 3c treats them as non-Strongholds for Siege/Storm purposes (the rules treat Commanderies as Lord Seats granted by T12 Ordensburgen, not as boxed strongholds).
